title: Create: Abuti
description: Create addon that adds some salmon sushi and a way to craft creative motors using those sushi.
body:
# Create: Abuti
Create addon that adds some salmon sushi and a way to craft creative motors using those sushi.
## Dependencies
- Forge 1.20.1
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
## Items
### Salmon Sushi
Normal Sushi with 5 attack damage. _(Is this really Sushi?)_
### Cheese Salmon Sushi
Special Sushi with 7 attack damage.
When eat, it gives you haste II for 3 minutes. _(Sushi...??)_
### Aburi Cheese Salmon
Ultimate Sushi with 11 attack damage.
When eat, it gives you fire resistance and slow falling for 10 minutes. _(This sushi is stronger than netherite axe!?)_
### Truth of Abuti
The singularity of sushi.
It gives you infinite sushi, and a way to craft creative motor. _(SINGULARITY of SUSHI!???)_
## Recipes
- Deploy raw salmon on dough to get Salmon Sushi
- Spout 100mb of milk on Salmon Sushi to get Cheese Salmon Sushi
- Cook in smoker/campfire/bulk smoking to get Aburi Cheese Salmon

- Mechanical craft 49 Aburi Cheese Salmon, 20 eyes of ender, 4 precision mechanisms, 4 blocks of diamond, 4 netherite ingots using 81 mechanical crafters to get Truth of Abuti

- Mix Truth of Abuti to get infinite Salmon Sushi
- Press Truth of Abuti to get infinite Cheese Salmon Sushi
- Compact Truth of Abuti to get infinite Aburi Cheese Salmon
- Right click crying obsidian with Truth of Abuti to get creative motor
## Trivia
This mod was made for my Discord server: "Abuti Server".
